info.DAtuviSezaH: asya DAtoH rUpezu aco rahAByAM dve 8.4.46 iti vEkalpike dvitve kfte 'mUrCC' iti prApte tataH Kari ca 8.4.55 iti cartve 'mUrcC' iti cakArasahitaH CakAraH api Bavitum arhati
info.english_meaning: to faintto be unconscious to be shy

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'sammUrcCiteva kOravya prajajvAla ca tejasA' (BA॰vi॰17.10) sammUrcCitA=vyAptA sammUrCanamaBivyAptiriti koza ityarjunamiSraH

'kasmAdezAM kalaho nAvamUrcCet' (BA0 u0 293) avamUrcCet=varDeta atra mUrcCateH kevalasya yo'rTaH samucCrAyalakzaRaH sa evAvapUrvasya api vA'vo viSezakaH syAt nAvamUrcCet=nApakfzyeta na SAmyet avo'sAkalye
